query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Teem', 'To be stocked to overflowing', 'The author hoped the new policy would teem tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Telepathy', 'The capability to communicate directly by psychic means', 'Critics argued that the plan might telepathy the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Telephony', 'Sound transmission via the electromagnetic spectrum', 'The essay highlights the telephony of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Telltale', 'A person who heedlessly reveals private matters', 'Her telltale became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Temerity', 'Excessive confidence or boldness', 'The essay highlights the temerity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Temper', 'Soften or moderate (an extreme)', 'Her temper became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Temperate', 'Moderate or self-restrained', 'The author hoped the new policy would temperate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Temporal', 'Pertaining to time', 'The author hoped the new policy would temporal tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Temporize', 'To be indecisive or evasive to gain time', 'Over time, the community learned to temporize its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tempt', 'To entice to do something often regarded as unwise or wrong', 'Over time, the community learned to tempt its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tempter', 'Someone or something that tempts, especially to evil', 'The author hoped the new policy would tempter tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenable', 'Reasonable, maintainable', 'What seemed tenable at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenacious', 'Holding firmly to something', '“She had a tenacious grip on her beliefs.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenacity', 'The quality or property of being persistent or stubborn', 'Her tenacity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenant', 'A person that rents or occupies land', 'Her tenant became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tendency', 'A likelihood of behaving in a particular way', 'The essay highlights the tendency of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tendentious', 'Having a bias or purpose', 'The reviewer described the tone as tendentious, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenet', 'A principle or belief', '“The tenets of democracy emphasize equality.”', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenor', 'The adult male voice between the bass and countertenor', 'Her tenor became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tentative', 'Not certain or fixed', '“They made a tentative agreement.”', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenuous', 'Weak or insubstantial', '“His argument was tenuous and lacked support.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tenure', 'The holding or possessing of something', 'The essay highlights the tenure of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tepid', 'Lukewarm, neither warm nor cool', 'Scholars noted a striking tepid between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tercentenary', 'Tricentenntial', 'The essay highlights the tercentenary of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Termagant', 'Quarrelsome and scolding or censorious, shrewish', 'The essay highlights the termagant of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terminal', 'Fatal, resulting in death', 'Her terminal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terminate', 'To finish or end', 'Critics argued that the plan might terminate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terminus', 'The end or final point of something', 'Her terminus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terrac', '(Especially of a house or a row of houses) built in a row and having a uniform front', 'Scholars noted a striking terrac between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terrestrial', 'Representing the earth as distinct from other planets', 'Her terrestrial became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terrify', 'To frighten greatly, to fill with terror', 'Critics argued that the plan might terrify the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Territorial', 'Of, relating to, or restricted to a specific geographic area', 'Over time, the community learned to territorial its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Terse', 'Sparing in the use of words; abrupt', 'Her terse became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Testament', 'A will, relating to one''s personal property', 'Critics argued that the plan might testament the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Testator', 'One who dies having made a legally valid will', 'Her testator became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Testimonial', 'A statement, especially one given under oath, testimony', 'Scholars noted a striking testimonial between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Testy', 'Easily annoyed, irritable', 'Scholars noted a striking testy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Tether', 'A rope or chain by which an animal is tied to a fixed object', 'Critics argued that the plan might tether the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Thearchy', 'The rule or government of a god', 'Her thearchy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theism', 'Belief in the existence of at least one deity', 'Her theism became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theocracy', 'Government under the control of a religion', 'Her theocracy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theocrasy', 'Interaction, admixture, and conflation of divine principles', 'The essay highlights the theocrasy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theologian', 'One who studies theology, especially christian', 'The essay highlights the theologian of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theological', 'Relating to the nature and will of god as revealed to humans', 'The author hoped the new policy would theological tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theology', 'The field of study and analysis of divine things', 'The essay highlights the theology of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theoretical', 'Based on ideas rather than practice', '“His research was highly theoretical.”', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theorist', 'Someone who constructs theories', 'The essay highlights the theorist of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Theorize', 'To formulate theories about some specific subject', 'Over time, the community learned to theorize its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Therapeutic', 'Of or pertaining to the treating or curing of disease', 'Critics argued that the plan might therapeutic the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Thereabout', 'About or near that place or time', 'The essay highlights the thereabout of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
